description: Destroy tool. Pins linode_id/image/root_pass required rejections, the confirm-alone destroy gate, and the bypassed rebuild POST body.

cases.name: requires root_pass
cases.expect_error: at least one authentication method is required: root_pass, authorized_keys, or authorized_users

cases.name: confirm alone hits the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_instance_rebuild is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)
